name: Obby: Raft
description: Welcome to Obby: Raft! In this game you have to fish to gain points and unlock new levels and abilities. Develop, win, collect unique pets and get stronger with each world! Practice - increase your knowledge for new achievements. Fish - develop and improve your skills. Pet - unlock allies for extra help. New Locations - explore unique worlds.
instructions: PC W A S D - move PCM - rotate camera LKM - lick Mobile device Left Joystick - move Right side of the screen - rotate camera
